data.body: DECISION RECORDED (2026-06-09, audit owner direction: clean break from dso, no dso-era functionality preserved): EXECUTE THE DELETE PATH. Delete src/rebar/_engine/jira-capability-probe.py and tests/scripts/test_jira_capability_probe.py in one commit; full suite green. The adopt path in the description is context only — do NOT adopt without new owner sign-off recorded on this ticket. Release-notes line: 'Removed unreachable dso-era Jira capability probe (never exposed via CLI/MCP).'
